A place for
everyone.

A charity giving residents in social housing a platform to share their views, express their needs, and shape their future.

100%

Giving You a Voice

We are loudertogether.

A Place Called Us exists to give social housing residents a transparent, trusted platform. Whether you want to share concerns about safety, push for better services, or simply connect with neighbours — your voice matters here.

  • A place to be heard
  • A place you belong
  • A place of support
  • A place that's safe
  • A place you're valued
  • A place for everyone
Join Us Today
What We Do

Four pillars.
One community.

🔊
Voice & Advocacy

A transparent platform for residents to share views, report concerns, and be heard by those who make decisions about their homes.

💡
Info & Guidance

Clear, useful information on your rights, local services, and housing regulations — so you always know where you stand.

🤝
Community & Connection

From resident socials to shared spaces, we build the connections that make a place feel like home.

💰
Funding & Support

Directing funding and resources to the areas your resident group identifies as most needed — fair, transparent, community-led.

"Every resident deserves a platform. Every voice deserves to be heard. Every community deserves to shape its own future."
